rules.note: Clan-locked fighting stances. Same schema as stances.json — id / category / name / prerequisite / description / effects / actions. The owning clan is referenced via clans-bundle.json -> stanceGrants[].stanceId so a stance's metadata only lives here.

stances.name: Gentle Fist Stance
stances.description: In addition to the Byakugan, the Hyuga are known for their Gentle Fist stance. The Gentle Fist is the premiere fighting style for the Hyūga clan. While in this stance you use your clan's Hijutsu ability modifier (Strength or Wisdom, per Hijutsu Flexibility) to make unarmed attacks.
effects: Your [Unarmed Damage] die becomes a d8. This becomes 2d8 at 11th level.
Your [Unarmed Damage] becomes Chakra or Necrotic which you choose when you roll damage.
Your Hijutsu gain their Eight Trigram effect.
Beginning at 7th level, when you deal chakra damage to a creature with 0 chakra, you instead deal double the result as force damage to their hit points.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have the Extra Attack class feature, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.

actionOptions.name: Gentle Fist Strike
actionOptions.description: Make an unarmed attack using your Hyūga Hijutsu casting ability modifier (Strength or Wisdom — whichever is highest, per Hijutsu Flexibility). On a hit, deal your Gentle-Fist unarmed die as Chakra or Necrotic damage (your choice). Your Hijutsu cast while in this stance also gain their Eight Trigram effect.

scaling.description: Bonus L7: if you don't have Extra Attack, you can attack twice with the Attack action while in this stance, and any chakra damage to a 0-chakra target instead deals double the result as Force to hit points.

stances.name: Smoke Style
stances.description: The Iburi clan's unique fighting style. Enter Smoke Style as a Bonus Action; select a variant (Dancing Cinder or Fume Brawler). Swap variants by spending a Bonus Action on subsequent turns. While in this stance you also benefit from either a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu stance simultaneously.
effects: Movement speed +5 ft. This increases to +10 at 7th and +15 at 15th levels.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have the Extra Attack class feature, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.
You can benefit from a Taijutsu OR Bukijutsu stance simultaneously while in Smoke Style.

actions.name: Swap Smoke Style Variant
actions.description: Switch between Dancing Cinder and Fume Brawler variants.

actionOptions.name: Cinder Bow (Dancing Cinder variant)
actionOptions.description: Smoke-bow ranged weapon granted while in Dancing Cinder variant. Statistics of a Long Bow with a d12 damage die, Fire damage, uses your Iburi Hijutsu Flexibility (Con or Int) for hit + damage. Cannot be disarmed; dismiss at no cost, reform as a Bonus Action. Once per turn, if your attack is 5 or higher than target AC they gain a rank of Dazzled. Once per round, take an attack of opportunity without spending your reaction. Creatures within 10 ft of you provoke attacks of opportunity. (L7 Smoke Burst — Punishing Smog: +1 crit threat range; can target a point instead of a creature to fill a 10-foot cube with heavily obscuring smoke until your next turn.)

scaling.description: Smoke Burst — Punishing Smog: +1 crit threat range; can target a point to fill a 10-foot cube with heavily obscuring smoke until your next turn.

actionOptions.name: Smoke Chains (Fume Brawler variant)
actionOptions.description: Smoke-whip melee weapon granted while in Fume Brawler variant. Statistics of a Whip with a d10 damage die, Fire damage, uses your Iburi Hijutsu Flexibility (Con or Int) for hit + damage. Cannot be disarmed; dismiss at no cost, reform as a Bonus Action. Once per turn, if your attack is 5 or higher than target AC they gain a rank of Envenomed. Once per round, take Dash or Disengage at no action cost. As part of casting a Fire Release jutsu or passing a Str/Dex save, you can morph into smoke and shift 15 ft (opportunity attacks at disadvantage). (L7 Smoke Burst — Incapacitating Smoke: Smoke Chain gains Reach 3 and the Special property as if it were a Battle Wire; trips can hit all creatures within 5 ft of the target.)

scaling.description: Smoke Burst — Incapacitating Smoke: Smoke Chain gains Reach 3 and Battle-Wire Special property; Trip can affect all creatures within 5 ft of the target.

stances.name: Four-Legs Technique
stances.description: The Inuzuka's rabid-beast fighting style. Drop down on all fours and enter the Four-Legs Taijutsu stance to fight like a hunter, a predator, a Dog.
effects: Your [Unarmed Damage] becomes 2d4 Slashing. Increases to 4d4 at 11th level.
You can use your Hijutsu Flexibility ability modifier (Strength or Wisdom) in place of Strength for attacks and damage.
Speed increases by +10 ft, and you don't spend extra movement when Wall or Water Walking.
You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action.

actionOptions.name: Claw / Fang Strike
actionOptions.description: Unarmed strike using your sharpened claws / teeth while in the Four-Legs stance. Uses your Inuzuka Hijutsu Flexibility ability mod (Strength or Wisdom) for hit + damage; deals slashing damage.

stances.name: Shadow Arts
stances.description: The Nara clan's shadow-manipulation stance — focus, coordination, and isolation of foes. Enter as a Bonus Action; treated as a Chakra stance. The stance powers Shadow Possession and Bright/Dimly Lit jutsu modifiers (your GM picks the active time-of-day each scene).
effects: While in this stance, your Nara Hijutsu gain their Bright or Dimly Lit effect (GM's call per scene).
Limited Shadow: you can hold 1 Shadow-Bound creature at a time. This increases to 2 at 7th and 3 at 15th levels.
Distorted Shadow: you cannot use Shadow Possession while unable to mold chakra or while losing concentration.
Shadows Reach: the range of Shadow Possession increases by +20 ft at 7th and 15th levels (base 40 ft → 60 → 80).

actions.name: Shadow Possession
actions.description: Select a creature you can see within 40 ft. Their shadow connects to yours; the target makes a Dexterity save vs your highest Jutsu save. On a failure, they become Shadow Bound. A Shadow-Bound creature remakes the save at the end of each of their turns, ending the condition on a success. (Reach grows to 60 ft at 7th and 80 ft at 15th. Mendokusē reduces this to a Bonus Action at L15.)

stances.name: Cross-Style
stances.description: Sarutobi's signature stance. Counts as a Chakra, Taijutsu AND Bukijutsu stance simultaneously. Enter as a Bonus Action. Chakra Powered Strikes give your unarmed die 1d6 and your [Unarmed Damage] / [Weapon Damage] takes the damage type of your Advanced Nature Affinity (Medical → Poison). Unified Form lets you spend Will to chain a second jutsu of a different discipline as part of the same Action.
effects: Counts as Chakra + Taijutsu + Bukijutsu stance simultaneously.
Chakra Powered Strikes — your unarmed damage die becomes 1d6; your [Unarmed Damage] / [Weapon Damage] types become the damage type of your Advanced Nature Affinity (Medical → Poison).

Unified Form — once per turn when you cast a Jutsu (Ninjutsu / Genjutsu / Taijutsu / Bukijutsu) as an Action, spend Will (D-Rank 1, C 2, B 3, A 4, S 5) to cast a second jutsu of a different discipline but the same rank as part of the same Action. Same casting time; neither can require concentration or cost-reduction effects. After using, you cannot Bonus-Action-cast a jutsu until your next turn.

Order matters — Any > Ninjutsu: affected creatures with Physical/Elemental/Sensory conditions suffer -1 save vs the Ninjutsu. Any > Taijutsu: the initial jutsu gains Combo; the Taijutsu pushes affected creatures 10 ft. Any > Bukijutsu: the initial jutsu gains Chain; the Bukijutsu damage gives -1 AC until your next turn. Any > Genjutsu: select a willing ally within half movement speed; you each swap places.

stances.name: Mokuton Infusion
stances.description: Senju's signature Wood-Release stance. Enter as a Bonus Action; select a variant (Will of the Buddha or Fist of Hevajra). Swap with a Bonus Action on subsequent turns. Like Smoke Style, you can simultaneously benefit from either a Taijutsu OR Bukijutsu stance.
effects: Counts as a Chakra stance and stacks with either a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu stance.
Will of the Buddha — while wielding a Combat Scroll, you can replace each Attack-action attack with a Verdant Lash attack.

Fist of Hevajra — your [Unarmed Damage] type becomes Cold / Earth / Chakra (your choice on damage); unarmed attacks use your Hijutsu Flexibility ability mod; unarmed attacks gain Reach 1 (Reach 2 at 7th).

actions.name: Swap Mokuton Variant
actions.description: Switch between Will of the Buddha and Fist of Hevajra.

actionOptions.name: Verdant Lash (Will of the Buddha variant)
actionOptions.description: Lash out with bramble strikes. Make a melee or ranged Jutsu attack using your highest jutsu attack bonus. On a hit, deal the listed damage. If you roll an 8 or higher on the damage die, inflict 1 rank of Drained and push/pull the target 10 ft. At 7th — 15 ft, 2 ranks Drained, treated as casting a D-Rank Hijutsu. At 11th — damage +1 die. At 15th — 3 ranks Drained.

scaling.description: Push/pull becomes 15 ft; inflicts 2 ranks Drained; treated as casting a D-Rank Hijutsu.

stances.name: Agile Fist
stances.description: Uchiha's highly agile combat form. Counts as both a Taijutsu and Bukijutsu stance because of its ability to integrate unarmed and weapon-based martial options simultaneously. Enter as a Bonus Action.
effects: Your [Unarmed Damage] becomes 1d6; weapons you wield with a smaller die become d6.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.
Use your Hijutsu Flexibility ability mod in place of Strength for Unarmed and Weapon attacks + damage.

When you take damage from an attack, spend your reaction to use half your AC as DR vs the triggering damage. If you reduce the damage by half or more, you can use Great Assault as part of the same reaction.
Counts as both a Taijutsu AND Bukijutsu stance.

actionOptions.name: Great Assault
actionOptions.description: Make a melee or ranged (60 ft) Jutsu attack using your highest jutsu attack bonus, dealing your [Unarmed Damage] + [Weapon Damage] and forcing a Dex or Wis save vs your attack-type save DC. On failure, the target becomes Off-Guard until the end of your next turn. At 7th level you can make a number of Great Assault attacks equal to the number of attacks granted by the Attack action.

scaling.description: Number of Great Assault attacks scales with Extra-Attack count.

stances.name: Flaming Spark
stances.description: Mutation-Uchiha chakra stance — build flaming chakra in your lungs until each word you speak is followed by a spark of ember or wisps of smoke. Enter as a Bonus Action. Compatible with Agile Fist OR Blazing Fan (but not all three at once).
effects: When you cast a jutsu with the Fire Release keyword, you become Enflamed until your next turn. While Enflamed, attacks that deal Fire damage gain +1 to crit threat range.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice with Flame Flower as part of the Attack action.
Compatible with Agile Fist OR Blazing Fan (not all three).

actionOptions.name: Flame Flower
actionOptions.description: Spit a ball of flame. Make a ranged Jutsu attack at a creature within 60 ft. On a hit, deal 2d6+2 Fire damage and force a Dex or Con save vs your attack-type save DC, becoming Off-Guard on failure. At 7th, damage becomes 3d6+3.

stances.name: Blazing Fan
stances.prerequisite: Uchiha Mutation clan (Divergent Techniques) + wielding a Gunbai Fan
stances.description: Mutation-Uchiha bukijutsu stance — take hold of the clan's signature Gunbai Fan. Enter as a Bonus Action while wielding a Gunbai Fan.
effects: The Gunbai Fan's [Weapon Damage] die becomes 1d8.
The Gunbai Fan gains 1 rank of the Blocking property.
The Gunbai Fan loses the Two-Handed property.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice with the Gunbai Fan as part of the Attack action.
As a reaction to taking damage from a Ninjutsu / Taijutsu / Bukijutsu, you can perform Uchiha Return (Clash using your highest skill between Ninshou, Martial Arts or Chakra Control).

actions.name: Uchiha Return
actions.description: On taking damage from Ninjutsu / Taijutsu / Bukijutsu, swipe your fan, initiating a Clash using your highest skill between Ninshou, Martial Arts or Chakra Control.

actionOptions.name: Fanned Wind
actionOptions.description: Swipe your fan, creating a massive wave of force. All creatures in a 30-foot cone make a Strength save vs your highest Jutsu save DC, taking [Weapon Damage] + [Weapon Damage] and being pushed 20 ft on failure. At 7th, choose +10 ft to cone OR + [Weapon Damage].

scaling.description: At 7th, choose to increase the cone size by +10 ft OR damage by + [Weapon Damage].

stances.name: Binding Chains
stances.description: Manifest your Chakra-based Chains of Binding for 1 minute. Unlike other Chakra stances, you can simultaneously benefit from a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu stance.
effects: Counts as a Chakra stance and stacks with either a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu stance.
You gain the Seal Break benefit from Uzumaki clan Hijutsu you cast.
When you take the Attack action, you can choose to instead make Binding Chain or Striking Chain attacks. These attacks use your highest jutsu attack bonus.

actionOptions.name: Binding Chain
actionOptions.description: Encircle targets with chains. Make a melee or ranged Jutsu attack at a creature you can see. On a hit, deal half the listed damage and once per turn force a Charisma save vs your highest Jutsu save DC, being Sealed on failure. At 7th — target up to 2 creatures. At 15th — up to 3.

attack.damageType: Bludgeoning, Piercing or Chakra (half on Binding)

actionOptions.name: Striking Chain
actionOptions.description: Lash out with full force. Make a melee or ranged Jutsu attack at a creature you can see. On a hit, deal the listed damage. You can replace up to two Attack-action attacks with this. At 7th — attacks against a Grappled or Prone creature are always at advantage. At 15th — pick one physical damage type to deal alongside Chakra damage.

scaling.description: Attacks against Grappled/Prone targets are always at advantage.
Pick one physical damage type to deal alongside Chakra damage.

stances.name: Mind Disruption
stances.description: Yamanaka's psionic combat stance — enter as a Bonus Action to wield Mind Body Transfer. Powers the Beam (1st), Pulse (7th), and Wave (15th) modes.
effects: While in this stance you can use Mind Body Transfer's Beam mode as an Action or in place of an Attack-action attack.
At 7th level, you also gain Pulse mode.
At 15th level, you also gain Wave mode (AoE).

actions.name: Mind Body Transfer — Beam
actions.description: Make a ranged attack at a creature within 60 ft using your highest jutsu modifier. On a hit, deal 1d6 + mod psychic damage and inflict 1 rank of Mental Overwrite. Scales to 2d6 / 2 ranks at 11th.

actions.name: Mind Body Transfer — Pulse (7th)
actions.description: Charisma save; on failure, inflict 2 ranks of Mental Overwrite (3 at 15th). Does not reveal you if hidden.

actions.name: Mind Body Transfer — Wave (15th)
actions.description: Aura of psionic intrusion at half the feature's range. All creatures of your choice in the radius make a Charisma save, taking 5d6 psychic and 1 rank Mental Overwrite on failure.

stances.name: Divine Wind
stances.description:
Fūshin's signature chakra stance with two variants. Enter as a Bonus Action; swap between variants at the start of each turn at no action cost. While in either variant, you float gently 1 ft off the ground and cannot take falling damage if you fall no more than 50 ft.

Pressure Front — compress air into invisible cyclones spiraling under you, weaponizing pressure. Build 1 High Pressure each time you cast a Wind Release jutsu (max 4, 6 at 11th); lasts 1 minute. Spend 1 High Pressure to grant Wind Release jutsu the Swirl effect. Your Hijutsu gain Critical Success/Failure effects.

Razor Jet — push wind through a pin-sized chakra funnel for slicing wind jets. Each Wind Release jutsu you cast applies Low Pressure to one affected creature (lasts 1 minute). Spend Low Pressure on damage to push 10 ft. Wind Release area jutsu can change shape to Jet Needle (5-ft × 30-ft line; -2 to saves; +30 ft length at 7/11/15) or Cleave (line between two points within 60 ft; affected creatures gain +1 rank Bleed on failure).
effects: Float 1 ft off the ground; no falling damage if falling ≤ 50 ft.
Two variants — Pressure Front or Razor Jet — swap at start of turn at no cost.

actions.name: Swap Divine Wind Variant
actions.description: At the start of each turn, swap between Pressure Front and Razor Jet at no action cost.

stances.name: Medical Fist
stances.description: Hanami's signature taijutsu stance — infuse chakra into your bones and layer your top skin like a Chakra-Scalpel shell that extends off like a flail to pierce, slash and brutalize your opponent.
effects: Your [Unarmed Damage] becomes 1d6 and can deal Bludgeoning, Piercing or Slashing damage (your choice on damage roll).
Your melee attacks gain Reach. If they already had Reach, +1 rank of Reach (+2 at 7th, +3 at 15th).
You can use either Monstrous Burst OR Healer's Touch benefit from Hanami clan Hijutsu you cast (not both per casting).
Rank of Mastery to Athletics-based checks.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.

actionOptions.name: Medical Fist Strike
actionOptions.description: Unarmed strike using the Hanami Medical Fist stance — chakra-coated bones extend like a flail. Uses your Hijutsu Flexibility ability mod (Str or Int). Damage type is Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing (your choice on damage roll). Reach is granted.

stances.name: Dust Veil
stances.description:
Jiton's signature chakra stance. Release or recall your Dust Veil from a container you carry or from the environment as a Bonus Action. The veil dispels if you fall unconscious or take Lightning damage. Particle type was chosen at character creation (Carbon / Gold / Iron / Salt / Sand); your active particle type grants its base effects + Potency I/II upgrades you've taken.

Dust Veil abilities use your highest jutsu save DC.
effects: Active particle type's base effect applies while in this stance.
Dispels on unconsciousness or Lightning damage.
Carbon — 20-ft cube of corrosive cloud (Con save → Envenomed; cloud has 2 ranks Volatile).
Gold — 20-ft cone wave (Str save → Grappled).
Iron — 10-ft aura of serrated particles (Mobility-component jutsu casters → Dex save; Bleed already → suffer Bleed as if start-of-turn).
Salt — 15-ft aura (creatures below max HP → Con save: lose Reaction or take 1d6 earth/poison per Physical condition rank).
Sand — passive +DR equal to highest ability mod vs attack damage.

stances.name: Uplink
stances.description: Genwa Uplink chakra stance. Bonus Action to enter or switch from Downlink. While in this stance, electrical energy radiates off you in a neon color of your choice.
effects: You can utilize the Angel Link effect of your Hijutsu.
Genwa Hijutsu you cast can originate from any space or creature that is currently Signal Boosted.
When you take the Attack action while in this stance, you can replace attacks with Radiant Beam attacks.

actionOptions.name: Radiant Beam
actionOptions.description: Fire a blast of light-like energy formed from your Lightning Release. Make a ranged Jutsu attack within 30 ft (60 ft at 7th) using your highest jutsu attack bonus. On hit, deal 1d8 + jutsu modifier in Lightning damage (2d8 at 15th). On rolling a max die result (3-4 on d4, 5-6 on d6, etc.), you or an ally within 30 ft becomes Signal Boosted until end of your next turn. If you do not have Extra Attack, at 7th level you can make two attacks with this attack.

scaling.description: Range becomes 60 ft. If you lack Extra Attack, attack twice with Radiant Beam as part of the Attack action.

stances.name: Downlink
stances.description: Genwa Downlink bukijutsu stance. Bonus Action to enter or switch from Uplink. You manifest a neon weapon formed of light in a color of your choice.
effects: You can utilize the Demon Link effect of your Hijutsu.
Genwa Hijutsu you cast that affects a creature with ranks of Shocked converts 1 rank of Shocked into the Firewalled condition.
Melee weapons you wield (and are proficient in) become wreathed in neon light. When you take the Attack action with this weapon, you can replace attacks with Radiant Saber attacks.

actionOptions.name: Radiant Saber
actionOptions.description: Strike with a beam of light-like energy formed from your Lightning Release. Make a melee Jutsu attack within 5 ft using your highest jutsu attack bonus. On hit, deal [Weapon Damage] as Lightning damage; the target becomes Firewalled until end of your next turn. If you do not have Extra Attack, at 7th level make two attacks. At 15th level, +1 crit threat range.

scaling.description: If you lack Extra Attack, attack twice with Radiant Saber as part of the Attack action.

stances.name: Shikotsumyaku
stances.description: Kaguya's primary fighting style — train your young ruthlessly to utilize their unique physiology of manipulating bone structure. This is a Bukijutsu stance.
effects: You can use your Hijutsu Flexibility ability mod (Str or Con) in place of Strength for weapon attacks with a Bone Weapon.
Hostile creatures casting a jutsu with Hand Sign (HS) component within your weapon's range trigger attacks of opportunity from you.
When a weapon or Taijutsu attack using a Bone Weapon is 5+ higher than target AC, or you roll a natural 20, you gain a rank of Battle Lust.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.

stances.name: Claws of Night
stances.description: Vesper's signature combat style. In combat, sharpen and elongate your claws and enter the Claws of Night Taijutsu stance.
effects: Your [Unarmed Damage] die becomes 1d8 and damage type becomes Slashing.
Once per turn, when inflicting Bruised, you can change it to 1 rank of Bleed instead.

Once per turn, if you deal [Weapon Damage] with a Blade-group weapon that lacks Two-Handed (or [Unarmed Damage]), force a Con save vs your highest jutsu save — gain a rank of Crimson Hemorrhage on failure.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.

stances.name: Tameshi Itto-Ryu
stances.description: Yamada's signature single-swing executioner stance. While wielding a weapon listed in your Weapon Proficiency trait (Tanto, Broadsword, Katana, Odachi, Chokuto), it becomes your Executioner's Instrument.
effects: Use Hijutsu Flexibility ability mod (Str or Wis) in place of Strength for weapon attacks with Executioner's Instrument weapons.
Yamada Hijutsu cast with your Executioner's Instrument can use the Ideal Cut ability. At 7th level you can use Tao ability instead (one or the other per casting).
When you take the Attack action with an Executioner's Instrument, you can use the Empty Blade attack.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.

actions.name: Empty Blade
actions.description: Forgo all additional attacks beyond the first as part of this Attack Action. Roll a number of d6s equal to forgone attacks (+1 if the target is Severed). On each 5 or 6 (4-6 with Metal Tao), deal additional damage equal to your [Weapon Damage].

stances.name: Artistic Cataclysm
stances.description: Bakuton Artistic Branch — Chakra stance for the 3-mouthed explosive artist. Bonus Action to enter.
effects: All Clay constructs you command act as part of the same Bonus Action used to command them. Each can be commanded separately.
When you take the Attack action or cast a Bakuton Hijutsu that requires an attack, you can replace any number of attacks with Clay Bombing attacks.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice with Clay Bombing as part of the Attack action.

actionOptions.name: Clay Bombing
actionOptions.description: Ranged Jutsu attack using your highest jutsu attack bonus within 60 ft, 1d12 force damage. On a 12 roll, add 1 extra damage die (more explosive). At 7th — damage becomes 2d12 and Barriers/structures/constructs treat damage as vulnerable.

scaling.description: Barriers, structures and constructs treat damage as if they were vulnerable.

stances.name: Ballistic Knuckle
stances.description: Bakuton Reckless Branch — Taijutsu stance for the explosive-fisted brawler. Bonus Action to enter.
effects: Your [Unarmed Damage] becomes 2d8 Force; no ability modifier added.
Unarmed attacks gain the Deadly 1 property (Deadly 2 at 7th, Deadly 3 at 15th).
Resistance to damage from your own clan features.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice while in this stance.

stances.name: Broiling Rampart
stances.description: Futton Broil Branch — Taijutsu stance building Pressure with each strike. Bonus Action to enter.
effects: Use your Hijutsu Flexibility ability mod (Str or Con) in place of Strength for unarmed and weapon attacks.
Build Pressure: once per turn, gain 1 Pressure when you Dash, Disengage, or cast a Fire/Water Release jutsu. Max 3 Pressure.
Spend Pressure (1 each, uses your highest jutsu save DC / attack bonus):
• Boil Knuckle. When attack is 5+ over target AC, force Con save → Dazed on failure.
• Jet Dash. +20 speed; at end of turn boiling steam forces adjacent creatures to Con save → Corroded or Scalded on failure. Counts as a Taijutsu of your highest rank.
• Vent Strike. Once per turn when dealing [Weapon Damage] or [Unarmed Damage], +2 damage (+4 at 7th, +6 at 15th).
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have Extra Attack, you can attack twice while in this stance.
